app.title: Past Life Test - Time Portal Journey
app.description: Open the Time Portal and travel through 6 historical eras. From Ancient Egypt to the Modern Age, your choices reveal your past life occupation!

intro.title: Time Portal Journey
intro.subtitle:
Step through the Time Portal.
Your choices across the ages will reveal who you were.
intro.ctaSub: Share your past life with friends
intro.discover2: ⚔️ Make pivotal choices at each stop

egypt.title: Ancient Egypt
egypt.scene: Moonlight pours between the stone pillars of a great temple. The Pharaoh's coronation ceremony is about to begin. Thousands of eyes are fixed on you.

medieval.title: Medieval Europe
medieval.scene: Mist clings to the castle walls. In the distance, war trumpets sound, while roses bloom in the courtyard. A moment of choice arrives.

renaissance.title: Renaissance
renaissance.scene: A Florentine workshop fills with the scent of paint. Through the window, expedition ships prepare to sail toward new continents.

exploration.title: Age of Exploration
exploration.scene: Sails flutter on a ship docked at harbor. An unknown world waits beyond the sea, while at the observatory, a new constellation has been discovered.

industrial.title: Industrial Revolution
industrial.scene: Steam engines roar and smoke rises from factory chimneys. Meanwhile, in the countryside, people still believe in the healing power of nature.

modern.title: Early Modern Age
modern.scene: Jazz music fills a dazzling city night. Theater lights shine bright, while in a quiet cafe, someone writes words that will change the world.

result.label: In a past life, you were...
result.percentileStat: Only {percent}% of travelers got the same past life

knight.name: Knight Commander
knight.description: Your past life was a Knight Commander of Medieval Europe! You always led from the front on the battlefield and considered protecting the weak your sacred duty. You valued loyalty and honor above all else, and your comrades trusted you with their lives.
knight.quote: “Blades may rust, but honor is eternal”
knight.echo1: You have a strong sense of justice and cannot ignore wrongdoing
knight.echo2: You naturally shine in leadership roles
knight.echo3: You have a strong instinct to protect the vulnerable
knight.echo4: Trust and loyalty are your highest values

scholar.name: Royal Scholar
scholar.era: Ancient Egypt (15th c. BC) · Thebes, Egypt
scholar.description: Your past life was a Royal Scholar of Ancient Egypt! You recorded history beside the Pharaoh, observed the stars, and accumulated wisdom. Your writings on papyrus have been passed down through millennia to this day.
scholar.echo1: You love learning and enjoy deep thinking
scholar.echo2: You excel at systematic planning and execution
scholar.echo3: You perform best in quiet environments
scholar.echo4: You find satisfaction in recording and organizing

painter.name: Renaissance Painter
painter.description: Your past life was a genius painter of the Renaissance! You captured the world's beauty on canvas, mastering light and shadow with ease. Your art moved people deeply, and your works remain masterpieces that transcend time.
painter.quote: “The world is reborn at the tip of my brush”
painter.echo1: You are emotionally rich and drawn to beauty
painter.echo3: You hold high aesthetic standards in daily life

royal.name: Wise Monarch
royal.description: Your past life was a Wise Monarch of the Byzantine Empire! You ruled a vast empire, excelling in both diplomacy and domestic affairs. You led people with charisma and were recorded in history as a great ruler who cultivated law and culture.
royal.quote: “Only those who can bear the crown's weight are true rulers”
royal.echo1: You have a natural leadership presence
royal.echo3: You shine brightest when making important decisions

explorer.name: Great Explorer
explorer.era: Age of Exploration (16th c.) · Lisbon, Portugal
explorer.description: Your past life was an Explorer of the Age of Discovery! You raised sails toward unknown seas and discovered lands no one had visited. Curiosity outweighed fear, and you sailed endlessly, dreaming of new worlds.
explorer.quote: “Beyond the horizon lies a new world”
explorer.echo1: You love new experiences and challenges
explorer.echo2: You are drawn to travel and foreign cultures
explorer.echo3: You have a strong urge to break free from routine
explorer.echo4: You are a free spirit at heart

healer.name: Forest Healer
healer.description: Your past life was a Celtic Healer! You gathered herbs deep in the forest and cared for the sick. You understood nature's language and performed healing rituals by the moon's cycle. To the villagers, you were both lifesaver and spiritual guide.
healer.quote: “For every wound, there is a matching herb”
healer.echo1: You have exceptional empathy and read emotions well
healer.echo2: You are suited for counseling, medicine, or education
healer.echo3: You recharge your energy in nature
healer.echo4: You often become the go-to person for advice

oracle.name: Temple Oracle
oracle.era: Ancient Greece (5th c. BC) · Delphi, Greece
oracle.description: Your past life was a Temple Oracle of Ancient Greece! You delivered prophecies at the Temple of Delphi and read fate in the movement of stars. Through deep meditation and ritual, you communed with the unseen world. Even kings sought your counsel.
oracle.quote: “Close your eyes to see what is truly there”
oracle.echo1: You have strong intuition and see through to essence
oracle.echo2: You are drawn to psychology, philosophy, and spirituality
oracle.echo4: You read people's hidden emotions well

pirate.name: Pirate Captain
pirate.era: Golden Age of Piracy (17th c.) · Caribbean Sea
pirate.description: Your past life was a Pirate Captain of the Caribbean! With blazing passion for freedom, you roamed the seas and lived by no one's command. Bold and charismatic, your crew gave you their absolute trust.
pirate.echo1: You refuse to live a cookie-cutter life
pirate.echo2: You walk your own path as a free spirit
pirate.echo4: A touch of rebellion is part of your charm

share.title: Past Life Test
share.template: {emoji} After traveling through the Time Portal, I was {type} in {era}! What's your past life?

error.storage: Some features may be limited in private mode. You can continue.
error.data: Data loading error. Please refresh the page.
error.canvas: Graphics rendering issue. Please try again.
error.audio: Audio unavailable. You can still continue.
error.network: Please check your connection and try again.
error.general: Something went wrong. Please refresh or try again.
